## Objective

Explain what this change improves and who it serves.

## Engineering mode pre-check

- [ ] I read the existing file before changing it.
- [ ] I searched for similar functionality to avoid duplication.
- [ ] I checked related scripts, styles, routes, and shared components.
- [ ] I made the smallest safe change instead of rewriting unrelated code.
- [ ] I preserved existing behavior unless this PR intentionally changes it.

## Change type

- [ ] New public page
- [ ] Existing page improvement
- [ ] Script or workflow
- [ ] SEO or metadata
- [ ] Navigation or routing
- [ ] Proof, trust, or governance
- [ ] Content, growth, or outreach
- [ ] Analytics or measurement

## Primary audience

- [ ] CEO, founder, or executive
- [ ] Recruiter or hiring manager
- [ ] PMO or transformation leader
- [ ] Healthcare operations leader
- [ ] Digital-health or product team
- [ ] Mina / internal career-growth use

## Quality checklist

- [ ] The change has one clear purpose.
- [ ] The next action is obvious.
- [ ] Internal links point to existing routes.
- [ ] Metadata is present where applicable.
- [ ] The page has one main H1 where applicable.
- [ ] Images have alt text where applicable.
- [ ] Required scripts remain installed where applicable.
- [ ] Important public pages are added to the sitemap.
- [ ] Site validation passes.

## Claim and trust checklist

- [ ] Claims are accurate and evidence-based.
- [ ] Strong claims link to proof, claims registry, a case study, or a relevant evidence page.
- [ ] Credential status is current.
- [ ] Role scope is not overstated.
- [ ] The page does not create confusion between positioning, proof, and outreach.

## Analytics and privacy checklist

- [ ] New analytics events are documented in `EVENT-TAXONOMY.md`.
- [ ] Analytics events track useful actions, not sensitive content.
- [ ] No patient, health, private document, or full decision-brief text is sent to analytics.

## Growth route strengthened

- [ ] Attention: Command Center
- [ ] Trust: Proof Room / Claims Registry
- [ ] Conversation: Executive Conversation Kit / Contact
- [ ] Decision: Career Intelligence Dashboard / Decision Navigator
- [ ] Distribution: LinkedIn Content Engine / Share Hub
- [ ] Direct growth: Outreach Command System
- [ ] Governance: Quality Audit / Quality Gates / Runbook

## Notes

Add reviewer notes here.
